_readme: Single source of truth for page copy. Keys under 'genes' MUST match the ID= in genome.gff3. Runnable cells reference a .py file in demos/ via 'src'.

profile.name: Jason Xu
profile.tagline: Bioinformatician — microbial detection, host-response RNA-seq, and reproducible multi-omics pipelines.
profile.blurb: M.S. Bioinformatics candidate at Boston University (B.S. Computer Science, University of Washington). I build reproducible genomics pipelines and database-backed tools for infection, immunity, and host-response research.

edu_ms.title: M.S. Bioinformatics
edu_ms.subtitle: Boston University · Boston, MA
edu_ms.summary: Graduate study in genomics data science, statistical modeling, biological databases, and machine learning for biomedical data.

edu_bs.title: B.S. Computer Science
edu_bs.subtitle: University of Washington · Seattle, WA
edu_bs.summary: Computer science foundations in algorithms, data structures, systems, and software engineering. Dean's List.

exp_iris.title: Bioinformatics Analyst Intern (Full-Time)
exp_iris.subtitle: IRIS Kinetics · Boston, MA
exp_iris.summary: Build and maintain Python/R workflows for high-throughput, label-free multiplexed microarray biosensing data — metadata validation, batch-level QC, normalization-ready outputs, and scientist-facing summaries across antibody-antigen, viral-particle, and nucleic-acid/SNP assays. Support microbial detection and diagnostic-assay development with CLIA-style validation readiness and traceability.

exp_bu.title: Bioinformatics Pipeline Developer
exp_bu.subtitle: Boston University · Boston, MA
exp_bu.summary: Design RNA-seq workflows (FastQC, STAR, featureCounts, DESeq2, edgeR, limma, Bioconductor) for QC, alignment, quantification, differential expression, and host-response gene-signature review. Implement motif/promoter analysis with MEME Suite and build reproducible, containerized notebooks (Conda, Docker, Git, Snakemake/Nextflow, SLURM).

exp_sepal.title: AI Model Evaluation Analyst
exp_sepal.subtitle: Sepal AI · Remote
exp_sepal.summary: Evaluated 400+ model outputs across scientific reasoning, structured-data transformation, and analytical workflows. Designed benchmark prompts and failure-mode reports for transformer systems — QA discipline directly applicable to pipeline validation and diagnostic bioinformatics.

exp_mbda.title: AI/ML Research Analyst Intern
exp_mbda.subtitle: MBDA Federal Procurement Center · Washington, DC
exp_mbda.summary: Built Python/pandas machine-learning analyses for large structured datasets (feature engineering, model comparison, statistical visualization, stakeholder reporting). Authored a 10-page technical report on generative AI and transfer-learning applications.

proj_multiomics.title: Microbial Detection & Host-Response Multi-Omics Workflow
proj_multiomics.subtitle: Python · R · Bioconductor · Snakemake · Docker
proj_multiomics.summary: A Columbia CII-aligned workflow integrating RNA-seq, high-throughput serology / protein-array outputs, microbiome feature tables, and clinical metadata into analysis-ready matrices. Maps to microbial discovery and host-response questions: QC reports, differential-expression tables, pathway enrichment, biomarker ranking, and reproducible reruns on shared HPC. The demo runs a minimal nucleic-acid/SNP detection step in your browser.

proj_dashboard.title: Clinical Genomics Dashboard for RNA-seq
proj_dashboard.subtitle: Python · FastAPI · React · PostgreSQL · Docker
proj_dashboard.summary: REST APIs and a database-backed dashboard for querying differential-expression results, gene annotations, volcano plots, and pathway-enrichment outputs from FastQC/STAR/featureCounts/DESeq2 workflows. The demo runs the core transcription/translation step live.

proj_rag.title: Biomedical Literature RAG Assistant
proj_rag.subtitle: Python · LangChain · OpenAI API · FAISS
proj_rag.summary: A retrieval-augmented system for gene-function and disease-association interpretation, combining vector search over biomedical literature with structured summaries for researcher review.

proj_portfolio.title: This Genome Browser
proj_portfolio.subtitle: Canvas · Pyodide (WASM) · GFF3 · GitHub Pages
proj_portfolio.summary: My résumé encoded as a genome and rendered like IGV/UCSC — data-driven from a GFF3 file, pixel-art styled, animated, and running real bioinformatics in the browser. The demo renders a GC-content plot client-side, no server involved.

report_mbda.title: ML & Deep Learning for Minority Business Enterprises

report_mbda.summary: Authored a publication-style internal technical report on machine-learning and deep-learning advancements and opportunities for minority business enterprises.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: the human behind the genome
about.summary: Bioinformatician and scientific software developer. M.S. Bioinformatics candidate at Boston University, B.S. Computer Science from the University of Washington (Dean's List). I work across microbial detection, host-response RNA-seq, high-throughput serology, and reproducible multi-omics pipelines — currently focused on infection & immunity bioinformatics.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: let's talk
contact.summary: Boston, MA · (425) 757-2656. Best way to reach me is email — open to bioinformatics and computational-biology roles.
